tasks.label: WAT: Check Status
tasks.detail: Snapshot: last runs, product counts by status, spot prices, next scheduled run

tasks.label: WAT: Run Discovery (Precious Metals)
tasks.detail: Scrape Costco for new Precious Metals products → add as PENDING in sheet

tasks.label: WAT: Run Research (Precious Metals)
tasks.detail: Score all PENDING rows: eBay comps + community signals + Claude → Tier 1/2/3

tasks.label: WAT: Research — Re-score Only (no Costco scraping)
tasks.detail: Skip discovery, re-score existing PENDING/WATCH rows only. Faster (~2 min vs 10 min)

tasks.label: WAT: Run Rotation Digest
tasks.detail: Score all WATCH products against each other, flag underperformers. Run on Fridays.

tasks.label: WAT: Run Active Monitor (LOCAL ONLY — needs Chrome session)
tasks.detail: Check stock/price/margin for all ACTIVE listings. Needs Costco Chrome session open.

tasks.label: WAT: Setup Sheet (refresh formatting)
tasks.detail: Re-apply dashboard formatting, headers, conditional colors, Legend tab. Safe to re-run.

tasks.label: WAT: Export eBay CSV
tasks.detail: Generate eBay Seller Hub upload CSV for all READY rows. Upload at seller.ebay.com.
